features.name: App access for admins and managers
Admins
features.description: App access for 1 super admin and multiple admins with all permissions

features.name: Managers
features.description: App access for managers with different permissions such as service manager, accounting manager, security manager etc.

features.name: Service professionals
features.description: App access for service teams to work on and close service tickets based on an approved workflow

features.name: Tenants
features.description: App access for property owners to view their tenancy and manage their day-to-day needs

features.name: Dependents
features.description: App access for dependents and family members of property owners and tenants

features.name: Property owners
features.description: App access for property owners to view their units and manage their day-to-day needs

features.name: Create leases
features.description: Create residential and commercial leases for units

features.name: Move-in and move-out tenants
features.description: Complete move-in and move-out processes for tenants

features.name: Integrate with EJAR
features.description: Integrate with your EJAR account with ease

features.name: AI-based EJAR Contract Reader
features.description: AI-Based reader that extracts all information from EJAR contracts and populates into Atar automatically

features.name: Transaction recording
features.description: Record transactions and generate invoices for all services

features.name: Payment recording
features.description: Record full or partial payments for transactions

features.name: Payment receipts
features.description: Generate payment receipts for invoices

features.name: Payment reminders
features.description: Send users reminders for payments

features.name: E-invoicing (ZATCA compliant)
features.description: Generate ZATCA compliant invoices with company logo and details

features.name: Online payments
features.description: Allow users to pay their dues online

features.name: Interactive dashboard
features.description: An interactive dashboard to see your performance at a glance

features.name: Performance measures and KPIs
features.description: Track KPIs including occupancy levels, cash flow, service requests and lease expirations

features.name: Lease reports
features.description: Generate reports on leases

features.name: Financial reports
features.description: Generate reports on financials

features.name: Tenant reports
features.description: Generate reports on tenant

features.name: Maintenance reports
features.description: Generate reports on maintenance

features.name: Property documentation
features.description: Add documentation related to your properties (Title deeds, warranties, floorplan and design documents, building completion certificate, etc.)

features.name: Property handover
features.description: Handover properties and all related documents and receive maintenance requests as part of the snagging process

features.name: Add and manage services
features.description: Enable and disable services, set service timings, define visitations days and times and set check-in limits

features.name: Add and manage service pricing
features.description: Define and set prices for your paid services including service fees and spare parts

features.name: Manage service workflows and automation
features.description: Management of workforce (professionals) schedules and automation of request assigning

features.name: Manage service scheduling
features.description: Organize workload by allowing users to schedule service visits based on service professional working hours

features.name: Manage service tickets
features.description: Manage service tickets from start to finish from assigning requests to service professionals to carry out work orders till closing requests with a secure code

features.name: Receive service ratings
features.description: Service ratings from the customer for the service provided by the professional

features.name: Visitor access management
features.description: Visitor access management tools including approvals for requests, defining visitation timings and daily limits on visitors

features.name: Add and manage common areas
features.description: Add common areas for buildings or communities such as hallways and entrances  that require regular upkeep

features.name: Manage common area service tickets
features.description: Manage service tickets from start to finish from assigning requests to service professionals to carry out work orders till closing requests with a secure code

features.name: Add and manage facilities
features.description: Add facilities such as meeting rooms, lounges, gyms and swimming pools

features.name: Facility booking management
features.description: Manage booking processes starting from defining bookable facilities along with days and times, carrying out approval processes and defining booking fees

features.name: Add and manage exclusive offers
features.description: Exclusive offers, discounts, and rewards for your clients

features.name: Send announcements
features.description: Send targeted and general announcements on demand to your clients

features.name: Manage directory
features.description: Give your users a way to contact important numbers

features.name: Send push notifications
features.description: Send push notifications on demand to your users

features.name: Send SMS messages
features.description: Send SMS messages on demand to your users

features.name: Integrate with WhatsApp Business
features.description: Let your customers reach you on your WhatsApp number

features.name: Services from third-party vendors
features.description: Connect to a network of the highest quality service providers to offer their services to your customers

features.name: Offers from third-party vendors
features.description: Offer your tenants discounts for different services and products from partners and affiliates

features.name: Customer relationship management (CRM)
features.description: A complete CRM system to capture and manage leads from start to finish

features.name: List units for sale or rent
features.description: List your units for sales or rent on your own Marketplace (Web and Mobile App)

features.name: Integrate with company website
features.description: Integrate the Marketplace on your company's website for more exclusivity and allow for easy access

features.name: Generate leads
features.description: Generate leads from interested customers that get in touch through your approved digital channels

features.name: Receive applications
features.description: Receive and review rental and sale applications from customers and carry out the necessary checks prior to completing the process

features.name: Schedule property visits
features.description: Schedule property visits and organize your sales team accordingly

features.name: Receive bookings
features.description: Receive qualified bookings on your properties

features.name: Receive payments
features.description: Receive payments for downpayments through Apple Pay, Mada, Credit Cards or SADAD

features.name: Company branded Web App
features.description: Launch your own unique company branded Web App

features.name: Company branded Mobile App
features.description: Launch your own unique company branded Mobile App for iOS and Android devices

features.name: Company branded Property Marketplace
features.description: Launch your own unique company branded Property Marketplace (Web and Mobile App)

features.name: Data migration support
features.description: Migrate from any existing system to Atar with support from our onboarding and account management team

features.name: Dedicated account management
features.description: Dedicated account management throughout your subscription period

features.name: Third-party integrations
features.description: Integrate with third-party systems to provide a seamless experience and synchronize data across systems

features.name: Customization
features.description: Request changes to workflows and processes and request new features based on your business needs
